mapper.sql: id,seed_num,transform_code, generation,plant_number,source_code, remark,create_time,create_user_id, create_user_name,task_num,species_code, breed_code,sample_number,current_number, region_num,vector_task_code,pd_num
mapper.insert:
insert into plant_multiple_stock_tb(id,seed_num,transform_code, generation,plant_number,source_code, remark,create_time,create_user_id, create_user_name,task_num,species_code, breed_code,sample_number,current_number, region_num,vector_task_code,pd_num, ) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.seedNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.transformCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.generation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.plantNumber,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.sourceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{item.createUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.createUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.taskNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.speciesCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.breedCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.sampleNumber,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.currentNumber,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.regionNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.vectorTaskCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.pdNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.stockNumberNotNullFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select distinct species_code from plant_multiple_stock_tb where current_number>0
